summary_one_line: Exact 4-byte profile tag/signature literals steering parsing to allocate a CLUT stage whose Tab.T table pointer is NULL.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The header must carry specific 4-byte literals at the profile signature/color-space/PCS tag fields (offsets 0x05, 0x0c-0x16) that lcms compares against constants while parsing the ICC profile, so a CLUT (LUT) stage is constructed but its Tab.T table pointer ends up NULL — making CLutElemTypeFree take the false branch at cmslut.c:534.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry the exact byte set the parser CMPs demand: offset 0x05='a'(61), the color-space tag bytes 0x0c-0x0f='link', the 0x10-0x13 PCS field='8CLR'/variants, and 0x2d=01 — these drive parsing to a CLUT stage with an empty (NULL) table, so 'if (Data -> Tab.T)' is false (avg hitcount on winner=9, resolved 8/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds hold the alternative constants ('c'(63) at 0x05, 'mntr' at 0x0c-0x0f, 'RGB ' at 0x10-0x13, 0x2d=00); they never reach the CLUT-with-NULL-table configuration, so the false branch is never taken (resolved 0/10, hitcount 0, blocked 24h).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback. CmpLogObserver records the exact comparand constants the lcms tag/signature CMPs expect, and I2SRandReplace splices those logged literals back into the matching input-byte positions, jumping the gate in one mutation. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and can only hill-climb via Hamming/prefix CMP_MAP buckets, which does not land the exact multi-byte tag literals here within budget.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the false branch of a NULL-table test in CLutElemTypeFree at cmslut.c:534.
Only value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch; value_profile stays blocked at all trials.
The decisive divergence between the pair is the I2S technique delta.
Winner and loser inputs carry different concentrated byte literals at the profile color-space/signature tag fields.
The color-space tag field 0x0c-0x0f differs between winner ('link') and loser ('mntr').
Winner inputs differ from loser at offset 0x2d (01 vs 00), a discrete parsing flag.
Winner-resolving seeds were discovered by value_profile_cmplog and contain the 'link'/'8CLR' tag literals.
Loser-blocking seeds were discovered by value_profile and carry the 'mntr'/'RGB ' tag literals.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc + token stack and CMP_MAP gradient feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2199 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0f46bd1d4a719e04`; the 15-level ancestor chain contains 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 14, the unwrapped-I2SRandReplace signal under the current build, confirming an I2S find in the winner lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the same NULL-table CLUT construction behind these exact tag/signature CMPs in which value_profile resolves the false branch as often as value_profile_cmplog would refute the claim that I2S substitution (not CMP_MAP gradient) is the decisive enabler.

weakest_evidence_point: Exactly which tag/signature CMP among offsets 0x05 and 0x0c-0x16 is the load-bearing gate that yields a NULL Tab.T is inferred from the byte diff, not pinned to a specific source comparison.
